name: Fresh Walleye
recipeInstructions:
1. Leave the skin on and place the fillet skin down under the broiler.
2. Brush the fillet with the paste.
3. Dust with paprika.
4. Broil one side for 10 minutes per each inch of thickness.
5. If sauce is desired, use a marinade made from fresh garlic, Dijon mustard, lemon juice, mayonnaise, and soy oil.
6. Garnish with lemon wedges, chopped parsley, or chopped green onion.
7. Serves 4 people.
(Per Serving): 201 calories/23 grams protein/1 gram carbohydrates/10 grams total fat/2 grams saturated fat/101 mg cholesterol/72 mg sodium (courtesy of Chef Ed Bihn, The Buxton Inn, Granville, Ohio). Reprinted with permission from the Indiana Soybean Development Council. Meal-Master format by Karen Mintzias.
